NoResponse.description: Response envelope for successful operations with no payload.

dnd-preferences-response.description: Current DND preference settings for the user.

quiet_hours.description: Time range for quiet hours in HH:MM-HH:MM format.

quiet_days.description: Comma-separated list of days when DND is active.

update-dnd-preferences-request.description: Request payload for updating DND preferences. Omitted fields remain unchanged.

quiet_hours.description: 'Time range for quiet hours in HH:MM-HH:MM format. For example, "18:00-09:00" means DND is active from 6 PM to 9 AM the next day.'

quiet_days.description:
Comma-separated list of days when DND is active.
Allowed values:
  • sunday
  • monday
  • tuesday
  • wednesday
  • thursday
  • friday
  • saturday
For example, "monday,tuesday" means DND is active on Mondays and Tuesdays.
